title: Live Updates: Spain Warns of High Death Toll in Heat Wave
summary_full: The health ministry said about 200 people may have died since Sunday. The forecast across Europe was set to remain sharply above normal on Thursday.
summary_public: The health ministry said about 200 people may have died since Sunday. The forecast across Europe was set to remain sharply above normal on Thursday.
